title: The Weight of Silence — Threshold
atmospheric_profile: tight rail composition: armchair with child's drawing and lamp, open door to pitch black hallway on the right, vertical tension, one light against overwhelming darkness
quality_notes: Excellent rail-optimized framing. The open door into blackness creates immediate dread and curiosity. Focal point (drawing + lamp) remains strong while adding narrative depth with the necklace detail. Consistent world tone, no repetition of poster composition.
